name: A New Day
formatted_address: San Jose, CA, USA
notes: "A New Day" is to meet the needs of those needing to start the day with a sufficient substitute, and an optimistic attitude. That "We Can Do This, One Day at a Time", drop in, listen to some readings, and please participate in an open discussion about the readings, or what is on your heart or mind.
